programme.title: Sunday Night With Matty Johns
programme.desc: Matty Johns and the team wrap up the round’s action with plenty of laughs along the way. Sit back, relax and unwind with the funniest team in league as they look at the round that was.

programme.title: Get 'Em Onside
programme.desc: Dan Ginnane, Joel Caine and Sean Ormerod have done the form so you don’t have to, with all the stats and insights you need to know ahead of Game 1 of the State of Origin.

programme.title: NRL
programme.desc: North Queensland Cowboys meets South Sydney Rabbitohs in NRL. The match is played at Queensland Country Bank Stadium. Match day 12.

programme.title: NRL
programme.desc: Round 12 begins with the hosts refreshed after a Magic Round bye & the visitors chasing their first four-game winning streak.

programme.desc: Matty Johns and the team wrap up the round’s action with plenty of laughs along the way. Sit back, relax and unwind with the funniest team in league as they look at the round that was.

programme.title: Sunday Night With Matty Johns
programme.desc: Matty, Fletch, Hindy & Nicho Hynes with the ideal way to unwind on Sunday. They'll have a unique recap of the round filled with laughs along the way.

programme.title: The Run Home with Scope and Fletch
programme.desc: Scope and Fletch take a light-hearted look at the latest NRL round & what's topical in rugby league.

programme.title: NRL Tonight
programme.desc: A one stop show for all your NRL news, views, team selections and more.

programme.title: NRL 360
programme.desc: Braith & Gordie are joined by journalists for opinions & breaking news. Plus legends, current players & coaches with views on what’s topical.

programme.title: Matty & Cronk
programme.desc: Matty Johns & Cooper Cronk break down crucial moments & react to storylines from the round throughout the 2026 season.

programme.title: NRL
programme.desc: With six wins from seven games under interim coach Kieran Foran, the hosts have rocketed into fourth. Both sides have two players on Origin duty.

programme.title: NRL
programme.desc: North Queensland Cowboys meets South Sydney Rabbitohs in NRL. The match is played at Queensland Country Bank Stadium. Match day 12.

programme.title: NRL
programme.desc: Round 12 begins with the hosts refreshed after a Magic Round bye & the visitors chasing their first four-game winning streak.

programme.title: NRL
programme.desc: The visitors head into a tough Origin period boosted by a two-game winning streak, while the hosts are looking to turn their season around.

programme.title: NRL
programme.desc: The visitors are powering along in second, but will be wary of the hosts after two narrow victories when they clashed last season.

programme.title: America's Cup Preliminary Regatta
programme.desc: Team Australia returns to the world's oldest sporting trophy after a 26-year hiatus as the final day begins.

programme.title: Super Netball Mini
programme.desc: The Swifts face a massive test against the Vixens as they try to keep their finals hopes alive.

programme.title: Pivot
programme.desc: The panel dissect all the action from Round 11 and discuss the latest news in netball.

programme.title: F1 Mini
programme.desc: Championship leader Kimi Antonelli carries massive momentum into the weekend following a dominant three-race winning streak that has put him 20 points clear at the top of the standings.

programme.title: Premier League Darts
programme.desc: Before the Play Offs and Finals in London, players will be aiming for a spot in the top four as Night 16 gets underway in Sheffield.

programme.title: Formula 1
programme.desc: Coverage of Canada Race.

programme.title: NASCAR Cup Highlights
programme.desc: The NASCAR Cup Series heads to Charlotte Motor Speedway with Tyler Reddick leading the championship by 129 points.

programme.title: USPGA Tour
programme.desc: Final Round action of the CJ Cup Byron Nelson from TPC Craig Ranch, Texas.

programme.title: America's Cup Preliminary Regatta
programme.desc: Team Australia returns to the world's oldest sporting trophy after a 26-year hiatus as the final day begins.

programme.title: F1 Mini
programme.desc: Championship leader Kimi Antonelli carries massive momentum into the weekend following a dominant three-race winning streak that has put him 20 points clear at the top of the standings.

programme.title: F1 Sprint
programme.desc: The Circuit Gilles-Villeneuve has been a strong venue for George Russell that could well provide the Briton with a good opportunity to hit back in the early stages of this title race.

programme.title: Premier League Darts
programme.desc: Before the Play Offs and Finals in London, players will be aiming for a spot in the top four as Night 16 gets underway in Sheffield.

programme.title: Ultimate Pool Pairs Cup
programme.desc: The 2026 Ultimate Pool Pairs Cup continues with Week Ten action.

programme.title: Formula 1
programme.desc: Coverage of Canada Race.

programme.title: Super Netball Mini
programme.desc: The Thunderbirds travel to Sydney to take on a Giants side with nothing to lose at Ken Rosewall Arena.

programme.title: Super Netball Mini
programme.desc: As the finals race continues, these sides will meet in a crucial match that will shape the top 4.

programme.title: Super Netball Mini
programme.desc: The Firebirds will look to spoil the finals race as they clash against the Fever at Nissan Arena.

programme.title: Super Netball Mini
programme.desc: The Swifts face a massive test against the Vixens as they try to keep their finals hopes alive.

programme.title: Pivot
programme.desc: The panel dissect all the action from Round 11 and discuss the latest news in netball.

programme.title: Formula 1
programme.desc: Coverage of Canada Race.

programme.title: Chequered Flag
programme.desc: All the reactions live from the Formula 1 paddock after the Chequered Flag of the Grand Prix.

programme.title: V8 Supercars 2026 R02 Mel V8SC
programme.desc: History is made at Symmons Plains Raceway as the Supercars Championship field lines up for Race 15, marking the milestone 100th Supercars race at the iconic Tasmanian venue.

programme.title: V8 Supercars 2026 R02 Mel V8SC
programme.desc: An 84-lap showdown gets underway at Symmons Plains Raceway as Round 5 of the Supercars Championship draws to a close.

programme.title: PRO BULL RIDERS CUP AUSTRALIA 2026 PBR
programme.desc: Join some of the toughest sportsmen on the planet for the ride of your life as they take on the meanest bulls in the world in a bid to be crowned Australia's best bull rider.

programme.title: The Bowls Show
programme.desc: The Bowls Show features highlights from BPL, interviews with stars of the game, and showcases some of the best moments from the game we all love.

programme.title: F1 Sprint
programme.desc: The Circuit Gilles-Villeneuve has been a strong venue for George Russell that could well provide the Briton with a good opportunity to hit back in the early stages of this title race.

programme.title: F1 Mini
programme.desc: Championship leader Kimi Antonelli carries massive momentum into the weekend following a dominant three-race winning streak that has put him 20 points clear at the top of the standings.

programme.title: UK Open Pool
programme.desc: Defending champion Aloysius Yapp faces a fierce 256-player field chasing a $225,000 prize fund, including World No. 1 Fedor Gorst.

programme.title: Premier League Darts
programme.desc: Before the Play Offs and Finals in London, players will be aiming for a spot in the top four as Night 16 gets underway in Sheffield.

programme.title: Formula 1
programme.desc: Coverage of Canada Race.

programme.title: V8 Supercars 2026 R02 Mel V8SC
programme.desc: History is made at Symmons Plains Raceway as the Supercars Championship field lines up for Race 15, marking the milestone 100th Supercars race at the iconic Tasmanian venue.

programme.title: V8 Supercars 2026 R02 Mel V8SC
programme.desc: An 84-lap showdown gets underway at Symmons Plains Raceway as Round 5 of the Supercars Championship draws to a close.

channel.display-name: [Foxtel] FOX FOOTY HD / FOX FOOTY HD

programme.title: First Crack
programme.desc: Jay Clark, David King and Leigh Montagna have the first opinion and analysis after a monster weekend of Footy.

programme.title: Bounce
programme.desc: Join the team to look at the last week in Australian Rules Football and have a bit of fun along the way.

programme.title: First Crack
programme.desc: Jay Clark, David King and Leigh Montagna have the first opinion and analysis after a monster weekend of Footy.

programme.title: AFL Mini
programme.desc: The high flying Crows head to Launceston to take on the staggering Hawks. It’s all on the line as 6th plays 8th and seasons start to be shaped.

programme.title: AFL Mini
programme.desc: All eyes will be on the Tigers and the Bombers in the annual Dreamtime at the G match.

programme.title: AFL Mini
programme.desc: The Saints travel to Western Australia to meet the Dockers under the Friday night lights.

programme.title: AFL Mini
programme.desc: Sir Doug Nicholls Round continues as the in-form Gold Coast Suns travel to Marvel Stadium to meet the Kangaroos to kick off a history making Super Saturday.

programme.title: AFL Mini
programme.desc: The Swans travel down to Geelong for a blockbuster match up on Super Saturday.

programme.title: AFL Mini
programme.desc: It’s the game the football world has been waiting for, when Scott Pendlebury breaks the all-time games record. Fox Footy will be there for all the celebrations.

programme.title: AFL Mini
programme.desc: The Power host the Blues in a massive Saturday night clash at the Adelaide Oval.

programme.title: AFL Mini
programme.desc: It's now or never for the Giants. They kick off the Sunday Ticket against the reigning Premiers at ENGIE Stadium.

programme.title: AFL Mini
programme.desc: The Dogs are desperate to regain their early season form as they face the new and exciting Dees, quickly rising to flag contention.

programme.title: Bounce
programme.desc: Join the team to look at the last week in Australian Rules Football and have a bit of fun along the way.

programme.title: First Crack
programme.desc: Jay Clark, David King and Leigh Montagna have the first opinion and analysis after a monster weekend of Footy.

programme.title: AFL Tonight
programme.desc: Fox Footy's nightly wrap of the day's big stories & how it will affect your team.

programme.title: AFL 360
programme.desc: Gerard Whateley and Garry Lyon discuss the latest AFL news as they are joined by special guests to breakdown what’s going on in the footy world.

programme.title: On The Couch
programme.desc: Join Jack Riewoldt, Jonathan Brown, Jordan Lewis and Nathan Buckley each week as they review the news and results from the AFL.
